Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "departments") SELECT json_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_object('count', COUNT(*), 'sum', json_object('budget', SUM("budget")), 'avg', json_object('budget', AVG("budget")), 'max', json_object('budget', MAX("budget")), 'min', json_object('budget', MIN("budget"))) FROM "_root.base")) AS "departments_aggregate"
